title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at RMZ Corp
jsonLd.description:
RMZ Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Amritsar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RMZ Corp:
RMZ Corp is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RMZ Corp!
